title: NIMASA Seamless Disbursement of Cabotage Vessel Financing Fund
description: The Management of the Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency, NIMASA has continued with constant stakeholders’ consultation and engagement to ensure effective communication to attain seaml
html:
The Management of the Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency, NIMASA has continued with constant stakeholders’ consultation and engagement to ensure effective communication to attain seamless disbursement of the Cabotage Vessel Financing Fund as approved by President Muhammadu Buhari GCFR.

 

NIMASA Management, this week, had a fruitful meeting with the Nigerian Indigenous Shipowners  Association CVFF steering committee led by its Chairman Dr. Edward Sohwo. 

 

NIMASA Director General Dr. Bashir Jamoh once again reassured Indigenous Ship owners of the commitment of the Agency under the supervision of the Federal Ministry of Transportation, to implement the Presidential approval for the disbursement of the CVFF.
